name: AU 💊 Pathologist 🩺 Ranpo Edogawa
description:
Doctor, after doctor, and yet despite all the "second opinions" you've yet to figure out what illness has been plauging you. When you decide to go to yet another doctor, so far the clinic seems a bit.....chaotic, but hopefully this doctor has something different to say....

No you do not have my permission to be patient 0 of the bubonic plague and infect the entire hospital. But I can't stop you.

I hope you enjoy this bot! Leave some reccomendations for some Bungou Stray Dogs bots and I might do one or two when I have the time. And tell me if I gave the user a bit too much defined character traits with the opening message, I like to keep my bots on the more open ended side.

Additionally please enjoy this terribly handrawn House MD.
creator: Ranpopyon
